calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 GAP-B mode-separation falsifier (escalated floor 0.5 / aux 0.3)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B / IGW-20260525-004 unblock. Supersedes V3-EXQ-543k (FAIL/mixed 2026-05-22T091714Z; ARC-062 weakens). 12-arm grid, env config, K_IDENTICAL_RUNS=3 basin-stability gate, acceptance criteria, manifest shape, and outcome-coupled REINFORCE P1 loss are byte-identical to 543k. ONLY varied factors: MODE_SEPARATION_FLOOR 0.25 -> 0.5 and P1_W_DEVIATION_AUX_WEIGHT 0.1 -> 0.3 on the gated arms (within the GAP-B design envelope per arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md decision-log 2026-05-20). PRIMARY = basin_stable AND diff_on_escape AND diff_off_reproduced_collapse AND c2c3_on_pass. Contributory PASS unblocks GAP-C/D (commitment_closure GAP-1 / V3-EXQ-598/598a/598b) and GAP-I (V3-EXQ-606b), which are all HELD pending this result. Yesterday's queue-experiment-543l-20260524T101523Z claim produced nothing (script + queue entry both absent); this is a fresh build from the 543k base. claim_ids: ARC-062, MECH-309, INV-074, MECH-334. estimated_minutes from 543k actual elapsed (~1121 min on ree-cloud-4).

items.title: Q-045 MECH-313 vs MECH-260 four-arm ablation (500-step + reduced hazard_harm)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-H / IGW-20260521-003. Supersedes V3-EXQ-603a (measurement_gap). Two-fix retest: (Fix A, per failure-autopsy V3-EXQ-603 retest spec section 11) STEPS_PER_EPISODE 200 -> 500; (Fix B, env-side reach extension added after env-code review of causal_grid_world.py:2024) hazard_harm 0.05 -> 0.02. Read confirmed env terminates on agent_health <= 0 OR env.steps >= 500; seeds 42/44 in 603a died at step ~14 from health depletion, NOT step-cap. Queue calibration note documents that hazard_harm=0.02 yields ~182-step episodes vs ~18 at 0.5, well past the 75-step FIFO warmup. Decoupled from latent harm signals: z_harm_s reads harm_obs (proximity field, scaled by proximity_harm_scale UNCHANGED), z_harm_a EMA over harm_obs_a UNCHANGED; AIC / MECH-091 / MECH-302 / dACC anti-recency / MECH-313 all read independent paths. Biological framing: raising lethality threshold without anesthetizing nociception. KEEP FIFO_WARMUP_STEPS=75 + per-episode gate + 4 arms + ARM-vs-ARM_0. 8-cell-design reference in autopsy artifact held out of scope. claim_ids: Q-045, MECH-313, MECH-260.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008. Phase-2 cutover interrupted Mac run (~62%); no _partial checkpoint -- full rerun.
